commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Matrix MessagePresentation rendering and sendPayload handling, outbound tests, a Matrix presentation docs page, and a root matrix-js-sdk runtime mirror dependency/check.

Reproducibility: yes. A high-confidence source trace shows core delivery calls renderPresentation/sendPayload only from the registered outbound adapter, while the current Matrix facade delegates only sendText, sendMedia, and sendPoll and this PR does not change that facade.
